findings.issue: A faint diagonal hatch/checkerboard pattern is visible filling the space below the footer line ('Oppdatert for 25 min siden · Abonner i kalender · last ned · Aktivitet · AI-budsjett …') at the very bottom of the full-page capture. Same pattern is visible at 375px but does not appear at 900px, where the background stays a flat colour all the way to the bottom edge. Suggests the page background colour isn't filling the full scrollable height on narrow widths, exposing an unstyled/transparent area below the real content.

The channel label wraps as 'NRK' on one line and an orphaned '1' alone on the next ('FIFA World Cup · Finale · NRK / 1'). Same row fits on one line at 375px and 900px, so this is a narrow-range wrapping quirk specific to 393px, not a content-hiding truncation.

notes: No horizontal scroll or edge clipping at 375px; single quiet column holds at all three widths, layout scales cleanly to the 900px desktop width without turning into a grid.

Match/event names read in full, nothing truncated in a way that hides key info: 'The Open', 'Corales Puntacana Championship', 'EFG Swiss Open Gstaad', 'Tour de France 2026', 'London Athletics Meet – Karsten Warholm (400m hekk)', 'Round 6 – XXVI Obert Internacional Sant Martí 2026', 'VM-bronsefinale', 'Moët & Chandon Belgian Grand Prix', 'VM-finalen 2026', '100 Thieves – Falcons', 'NM friidrett 2026 (Trondheim)'.
Norwegian-channel contract holds: only Viaplay, TV 2 Play, NRK1/NRK TV, NRK 1, BLAST.tv (gratis offisiell strøm) appear as 'where to watch' at any width — no ESPN/FOX/Sky seen.
One row (Round 6 – XXVI Obert Internacional Sant Martí 2026, chess) shows the honest empty '–' channel placeholder, clearly distinguishable from a missing/broken value.
No flags/crests/images are used anywhere in this design (pure monospace text, per the Tekst-TV identity) — nothing to check for broken image icons; not a defect.

'DINE NESTE' tracked list (Viktor Hovland, Kristoffer Ventura, Kristoffer Reitan, Casper Ruud, 100 Thieves, '+4 til i «Hva vi følger»') renders fully with correct relative-time labels (pågår nå / om 4 dager), no truncation.

Must-see accent dot appears on 6 of 11 visible rows today (The Open, Corales Puntacana, EFG Swiss Open Gstaad, Warholm, VM-finalen, 100 Thieves–Falcons) — a fairly high density but each is plausibly a followed/high-importance entry, not an indiscriminate blanket accent; worth a periodic recheck if the ratio keeps climbing.

Header, day-group headings ('I DAG' / 'I MORGEN' / 'ONSDAG 22. JULI' / 'TORSDAG 23. JULI'), 'Vis resten av de neste to ukene', 'Hva vi følger' disclosure + 'Rediger' link, and footer (Oppdatert for 25 min siden / Abonner i kalender / last ned / Aktivitet / AI-budsjett: uke 60% · økt 8%) are all intact and aligned at every width.
Live clock in the header updates correctly across the three captures (11:19:21 → 11:19:25 → 11:19:29).

Could not assess: whether the ⓘ AI-provenance badges (EFG Swiss Open Gstaad, Warholm meet, VM-bronsefinale, VM-finalen, 100 Thieves–Falcons, NM friidrett) open a working source modal — that requires interaction, not just a static screenshot.
